calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Continued To May-20-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:55 am and concluding at 10:08 am .

Plaintiff Ibarra Professional Law Corporation is represented by Gene Benitez Esq.
Defendant William Ross not appearing.

Crisostomo Ibarra is sworn to testify on behalf of the plantiff and testifies.

Plaintiff makes an oral motion to dismiss the doe defendants.

The Court GRANTS Plaintiff's oral motion.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ibarra Professional Law Corporation, and against Defendant William Ross, as follows:

1. Damages: $55,989.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $6,229.81
3. Costs: $843.19

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $63,062.00
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Ibarra Professional Law Corporation appeared represented by Gene Benitez.
Defendant William D. Ross not appearing.

Mr. Benitez appeared and requested a continuance to serve the 2nd Amended Petitioner recently filed in this matter.

This matter is continued to April 1, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

Mr. Benitez was reminded to provide courtesy copies of all the relevant documents and a proposed order prior to the next hearing.

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Ibarra Professional Law Corporation's unopposed Motion for Leave to File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court grants Plaintiff leave to file the Second Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff must file its Second Amended Complaint substantially identical to Exhibit A to the motion forthwith but no later than January 15, 2026.

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Continued To Dec-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Continued To Nov-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505

Plaintiff Ibarra Professional Law Corporation appearing represented by Gene Benitez, Esq.
Witess for Plaintiff Chrios Ibarra appeared in court.
Defendant William D. Ross did not appear.

Counsel for Plaintiff requests a continuance to allow time to amend the complaint and serve the defendant.

The court grants the continuance and continues this matter to Nov 5, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505.
